title: Funerary backlog at Veilbridge Sepulcher
player_safe_summary: The party enters Veilbridge Sepulcher and discovers that a routine request is entangled with local pressure, reputation, and a decision that cannot be solved by force alone.
gm_deep_summary: Run the opening using the Veilbridge Sepulcher quickstart card, then escalate through one authority, one pressured intermediary, and one consequence if the players ignore procedure.
